industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: PT Kencana Energi Lestari Tbk
summary: PT. Kencana Energi Lestari Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a renewable energy company in Indonesia. It owns and operates 3x6 MW hydroelectric power plant in Pakkat, North Sumatera; 3x7 MW hydroelectric power plant in Air Putih, Bengkulu; and 2x5 MW hydroelectric power plant in Madong, South Sulawesi. The company serves industries and homes. PT. Kencana Energi Lestari Tbk was founded in 2008 and is based in West Jakarta, Indonesia.
